name: Aspen/Pitkin County Airport Weather Station
note: Good upper-valley air-temperature and weather context for the Aspen and Maroon Creek Roaring Fork corridor.

name: Glenwood Springs Weather Context Station
note: General valley weather context station for Glenwood and the lower Roaring Fork/Colorado confluence area.

name: De Beque Lower Valley Weather Context Station
note: Lower-valley weather context station to support tributary and mainstem interpretation near De Beque and Cameo.
